name: Researcher
description: Live on-chain and protocol research agent for Mantle DeFi. Fetches real-time data from mETH LSP, Ondo USDY, Merchant Moe LBFactory, Pyth oracles via mantle-agent-kit-sdk when available. Provides fresh yields, supply, liquidity metrics, block proofs for Conductor and other agents. Always cites sources.

research_sources: on-chain RPC (symbol, decimals, totalSupply, getBlockNumber, LBFactory.getNumberOfLBPairs)

skills.name: Fetch Live Mantle Research Packet
skills.description: Returns block, yields, Pyth prices, Moe pairs, supply proofs for mETH/USDY.
examples: get fresh on-chain data for 7% risk mETH USDY goal
research Moe liquidity at current block
